I am calli

Any help!

ng get call https://world.openfoodfacts.org/api/v0/product/{barcode}.json  where barcode is identifier as shown below.

But when I pass the hardcoded value it works. as shown below.

entry.title: Re: how do we automate space & org members access in SAP...
entry.content:
@gayu61295 @tongzheng 

You will have to use SAP Cloud Identity Services using Identity Provisioning (IPS) for user sync provisioning process from Source System to Target System(SAP BTP)

entry.title: Project Version use
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have a question about how Project versions work in SAP S4HANA ?

  1. How does the process of creating and managing Project versions work?
  2. How to find all created project versions?
  3. How to activate/install a specific project version?

Thank you.

entry.title: Project System - Cost Element Default as 400000 in Material Assignment for Network Activity
entry.content:
Hello All Experts,

I am facing an issue, while assigning material for network activity, Cost Element is getting defaulted to 400000. 

See below image - 

 But when I checked the settings for Network Profile in OPUU, its all blank. No default cost element has been maintained there for 0000002 which I am using. 

Can someone expert tell me how can I change this to another one  ? Or From where it is getting defaulted ? 

Thank you for your time. 

 

Regards,

Tanuj K.

entry.title: Posting of Allocated Freight Costs Inbound
entry.content:
Hey Expert

Can the Posting of Allocated Freight Costs, Inbound freight cost Posting... for transaction key (Step 5b Inbound version) "BSX inventory posting or PRD cost price differences" be changed like the Outbound Freight Expense Account "TM2" (Step 5b Outbound version)?

Link: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/61e246f4b34c4e1790d8b7651c0b40a8/9265b145e72b4a3caddc5419756e75d0.html

Thank U

Romzi

entry.title: The RISE with SAP Methodology Dashboard in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
What is RISE with SAP

RISE with SAP is a comprehensive transformation journey and guided methodology to help SAP ERP customers transition to SAP Business Suite, to stay ahead of competitors and continuously innovate.
This includes clear steps to help you accelerate transformation based on enhanced SAP Activate road maps tailored for RISE with SAP that include task descriptors and accelerators, a clean core success plan, and quality gates.

Source: SAP

Furthermore, The RISE with SAP Methodology helps with:

  • Transition to SAP S/4HANA
  • Clean core activities
  • Adopting of a cloud environment and mindset
  • Guided transformation
  • Expert guidance from SAP and its partners
  • A set of tools and services

The overall goal

A clean core system approach have the goal to reach a system close to standard as much as possible while running cloud-compliant extensions and integrations.  It allows to adapt the system in a fast way to changing business requirements to adopt new capabilities.

This requires a strict and strong governance for each technical dimension of clean core.

 

SAP Cloud ALM and the clean core principles

SAP Cloud ALM supporting the clean core principles and helps customers to adopt and monitor the clean core principles.

The following graphic shows for each area which functions SAP Cloud ALM already offers today:

Source: SAP

The RISE with SAP Methodolog Dashboard in SAP Cloud ALM

Navigate to the section "RISE with SAP":

Click on the tile "System View"

Select a system of your landscape:

Now the data from the selected system is displayed:

Some useful links and ressources:

  • RISE with SAP Website
  • RISE with SAP FAQ
  • How SAP Cloud ALM supports the adoption of clean core
  • Jumpstart your SAP RISE Project with SAP Cloud ALM

entry.title: Re: Carrier selection based on gross weight ?
entry.content:
Hello @Ajit_Routray

Not the first time we interact each other, always a pleasure 🙂 

Indeed I beginned analyzing how to handle it through the TSPS and VSR1 process controllers. In these methods we have the transportation lanes data and the carrier list relevant for carrier selection processing. My initial purpose on this post was to ensure that in standard, this is not manageable. 

I assume we will deal with additional or "useless" fields on the transportation lanes in order to integrate our rules and manage them through custom strategies on the process controller. 

Thank you for your feedback and have a good sunday!

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Paging concept in Odata service
entry.content: Excellent blog

entry.title: Re: Create an OData service by passing a parameter and get Smart form as a PDF
entry.content:
Hi Everyone , I am implementing same scenario but when i call smartform with all input parameters from function module of smartforms in get stream 

there is an exception error :

An exception cx_sy_no_handler occurred message no tpda430 .

Have any one face this before how i can fix it ? is there any why out ?

the code :

  METHOD /IWBEP/IF_MGW_APPL_SRV_RUNTIME~GET_STREAM.

    DATA GS_STREAM TYPE TY_S_MEDIA_RESOURCE.

    DATA : FM_NAME            TYPE RS38L_FNAM,
           CONTROL_PARAMETER TYPE SSFCTRLOP,
           OUTPUT_OPTIONS     TYPE SSFCOMPOP,
           LW_SSFCRESCL       TYPE SSFCRESCL.

    CONSTANTS : GC_FORMNAME TYPE TDSFNAME VALUE 'ZZSOHEADERTOITEM',
                GC_X        TYPE C VALUE 'X'.

    DATA : LI_OTF      TYPE TABLE OF ITCOO,
           LI_PDF_TAB  TYPE TABLE OF TLINE,
           GV_BIN_FILE TYPE XSTRING.

    TRY .
        DATA(GV_VBELN) = IT_KEY_TAB[ 1 ]-VALUE.
      CATCH CX_ROOT.
    ENDTRY.


    IF GV_VBELN IS NOT INITIAL.
      CALL FUNCTION 'SSF_FUNCTION_MODULE_NAME'
        EXPORTING
          FORMNAME           = GC_FORMNAME
        IMPORTING
          FM_NAME            = FM_NAME
        EXCEPTIONS
          NO_FORM            = 1
          NO_FUNCTION_MODULE = 2
          OTHERS             = 3.
      IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
      ENDIF.
*
*      CONTROL_PARAMETERS-GETOTF = GC_X.
*      CONTROL_PARAMETERS-NO_DIALOG = GC_X.
*      CONTROL_PARAMETERS-PREVIEW = SPACE.
*      OUTPUT_OPTIONS-TDDEST = 'LP01'.
        control_parameter-langu  = 'EN'.
        control_parameter-getotf = abap_true.
        control_parameter-preview = space.
        control_parameter-no_dialog = abap_true.

        output_options-tddest    = 'LOCL'.
        output_options-xdfcmode  = abap_true.
        output_options-tdnewid   = abap_true.
        output_options-tdimmed   = abap_true.
        output_options-tdprinter = 'PDFUC'.
        output_options-tddelete = space.

     CALL FUNCTION '/1BCDWB/SF00004442'
       EXPORTING
        CONTROL_PARAMETERS         = CONTROL_PARAMETER
       OUTPUT_OPTIONS             = OUTPUT_OPTIONS
        USER_SETTINGS              = 'X'
         pvbeln                     = GV_VBELN
      IMPORTING
       JOB_OUTPUT_INFO            = LW_SSFCRESCL
      EXCEPTIONS
        FORMATTING_ERROR           = 1
        INTERNAL_ERROR             = 2
        SEND_ERROR                 = 3
        USER_CANCELED              = 4
        OTHERS                     = 5
               .
     IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
     ENDIF.


      REFRESH LI_OTF[].
      LI_OTF = LW_SSFCRESCL-OTFDATA[].

      CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERT_OTF'
        EXPORTING
          FORMAT                = 'PDF'
        IMPORTING
          BIN_FILE              = GV_BIN_FILE
        TABLES
          OTF                   = LI_OTF
          LINES                 = LI_PDF_TAB
        EXCEPTIONS
          ERR_MAX_LINEWIDTH     = 1
          ERR_FORMAT            = 2
          ERR_CONV_NOT_POSSIBLE = 3
          ERR_BAD_OTF           = 4
          OTHERS                = 5.
      IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
      ENDIF.

      GS_STREAM-MIME_TYPE = 'application/pdf'.
      GS_STREAM-VALUE = GV_BIN_FILE.

      CALL METHOD ME->COPY_DATA_TO_REF
        EXPORTING
          IS_DATA = GS_STREAM
        CHANGING
          CR_DATA = ER_STREAM.

    ENDIF.

  ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: Re: Read Freight order header and item texts in Custom BT...
entry.content: Please check this help site: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/03c04db2a7434731b7fe21dca77440da/63b1e7c2163b4e0db8cc6b2688c8af90.html

entry.title: Re: Particular column's name in service CDS is getting co...
entry.content:
Found the answer in the StackOverflow thread - https://sap.stackenterprise.co/questions/69328/69329#69329 

The CDS compiler and CAP runtimes provide automatic quotation for reserved words so that they can still be used in most situations. Automatic quotation is available for SQLite, SAP HANA, postgres and H2.

Read more on this in our docs

product is in the list of reserved words (you can find it in the HANA grammar) and hence is quoted by the cds-compiler.

entry.title: Re: SOST emails sent from which program
entry.content: The issue is not described well enough to propose a more precise solution. Users should know which business process is implied by simply looking at the email and the symptom would be reproduced and so could be traced.

entry.title: Re: CDS view required for Material Classification charact...
entry.content:
Hi, 

 

please check this topic https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/cds-view-material-classification/qaq-p/12354448

entry.title: Re: How to load Files(.csv) in IBP and archive them after processing using CPI-DS
entry.content:
Its been a long time since this post was made and I wish I could thank the author directly .....

After countless hours dealing with an integration as simple as load data to a key figure from a flat file(.csv) I couldnt identify what the issue was. This line in this post helped me a lot

'The order of the columns and data type are also important. Columns need to be maintained in the same order as they are in the file, otherwise CPI-DS will not map correctly the data. Enter the maximum length for every field that can be in the file.'

I couldn't understand what was wrong because I had assumed that as long as the header of the file matched the columns on the table that was enough. Well it happens that even the order of the columns have to be a match as well

Thanks Luliana

entry.title: Re: /SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION110
entry.content: Did you get any solution to this error i am also facing the same error"For ERP movement type 343, the following field cannot be changed: Type" in SAP EWM POsting change document ?

entry.title: Re: Intrastat not showing automatic CN
entry.content:
Check Intrastat Configuration (VI98), so ensure the billing type for CNs is correctly mapped.
Use a BAdI or User Exit, may custom development needed to include CNs in reports.

If this is a legal requirement, an support ticket may help to clarify.

entry.title: Resumo do SAP Inside Track RJ 2025 – Um Evento de Sucesso no Rio de Janeiro
entry.content:
Falando na minha participação, e do @Jonys_Arcanjo  no SAP Inside Track RJ 2025 ocorreu no ultimo sábado em um hotel localizado em Botafogo, com uma vista deslumbrante para a Baía de Guanabara. O evento contou com um anfiteatro lotado, destacando o alto nível de engajamento da comunidade SAP. A organização foi impecável, proporcionando um ambiente agradável com coffee-breaks pela manhã e à tarde, camisetas exclusivas do evento para todos os participantes e brindes oferecidos por patrocinadores.

O grande diferencial do evento foram as palestras altamente interativas, promovendo discussões enriquecedoras entre os participantes sobre temas relevantes da área técnica e funcional. Entre os tópicos que geraram mais debate estavam Clean Core, SAP Grow e a implementação do DRC. O mais interessante foi a diversidade de perspectivas, onde cada argumento fazia sentido dentro do seu contexto.

A programação contou com apresentações de alto nível, incluindo:

 

  • Manuel Robalinho, trazendo inovações sobre conectividade na área financeira e fluxo de caixa com IA;
  • Jonys Arcanjo, abordando novidades no SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC);
  • Marssel Vilaça, falando sobre o engajamento da Comunidade SAP;
  • Renan Correa, trazendo insights sobre DRC e sua implementação;
  • Fabio Dezan, com uma excelente palestra sobre Localização Brasil;
  • Luciano Casado, explicando a integração de Apps com SAP Grow;
  • João Secco, aprofundando o conceito de Clean Core;
  • Ely Barbosa, com uma aula prática e divertida sobre gestão de projetos e os erros comuns que devem ser evitados.

 

Após um dia repleto de aprendizado e troca de experiências, os participantes encerraram o evento em um bar próximo, onde seguiram a conversa em um ambiente descontraído.

Parabéns à organização por proporcionar um evento tão enriquecedor para a comunidade SAP no Rio de Janeiro! 🚀👏

entry.title: API / path parameters / VerifyAPIKey policy / Error
entry.content:
Hello Friends!

I've created an API proxy with a single resource defined with a path parameter. 

https://api-dev.cooldomain.com:443/v1/private/cart/{cart_id}/availability-check-url

It does route to the target iflow; however, when I add the VerifyAPIKey it fails the error far below.

This would generate the VerifyAPIKey error

https://api-dev.cooldomain.com:443/v1/private/cart/12068208/availability-check-url

This does not.

https://api-dev.cooldomain.com:443/v1/private/cart

I think my answer lies in this apigee documentation; however, I'm not able to reconcile the differences in terminology and screens 😞

https://docs.apigee.com/api-platform/publish/create-api-products#behavior-resource-path

Screenshots are below - any guidance would be appreciated.

Thank you  /Greg

Screen shots

 

{
    "fault": {
        "faultstring": "Invalid ApiKey for given resource",
        "detail": {
            "errorcode": "oauth.v2.InvalidApiKeyForGivenResource"
        }
    }
}

entry.title: Re: How to Add a Filter in SAP Cloud RESTful Application Programming Without Affecting Data Retrieva
entry.content: you'd better state your original business requirement/scenario instead of your technical design/imgination

entry.title: Re: Reservation movement allowed button disabled automati...
entry.content:
Hi Sellar,

for me it seems you need a customized workflow.

You can catch an created reservation document via BTP, using event trigger created / changed for the reservations. That means having needed services for that in place and create custom workflow to initiate a release of the reservation document and tick the box again via automatic.

Best regards

Dennis

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to upload Excel Spreadsheet on SAP Fiori UI5 Freestyle
entry.content:
Hello Victor,

I'm trying to follow a similar approach in my application. The file data is being uploaded but "XLSX.read" is failing because XLSX is 'undefined'. I have included the library. Declared the library on my controller. 

/* global XLSX:true */
sap.ui.define([
    "sap/ui/core/mvc/Controller",
    "../libs/xlsx"
],
function (Controller, XLSX)

In my manifest I have added the resource - 

        "resources": {
            "css": [
                {
                    "uri": "css/style.css"
                }
            ],
            "js": [
                {
                    "uri": "libs/xlsx.js"
                }
            ]
        },

 My controller screenshot from debugging - 

I have also checked in network tab, the xlsx library is loaded. 

Am I missing anything here?

entry.title: Re: Project Version use
entry.content:
Start here and read about Project Simulations and Project Versions to see how they are used and created.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4dd8cb7b1c484b4b93af84d00f60fdb8/d518bf53d25ab64ce10000000a174cb4.html

entry.title: Re: How to configure tolerances for goods receipts in SAP...
entry.content:
@Katalina_Guio 

You can achieve this by using the Purchasing Value Key, which can be maintained in the Material Master under the Purchasing View. This is plant-specific, allowing you to control the tolerance based on the plant level.

This configuration is available in SAP Public Cloud.

Path:
Procurement - Purchase Request and Order Management - Hub and One Procurement and Generic Settings - Define Purchasing Value Key

Based on your tolerance percentage, you can create and set it up in the Material Master either during creation or anytime later. It will automatically flow to the transaction data (Purchase Order).

As @Johannes_Schulte_VICOLAND  mentioned above, you can also maintain this in the Purchase Info Record.

entry.title: Re: Project System - Cost Element Default as 400000 in Ma...
entry.content: For components with material masters the cost element will come from MM account determination.  Start with the Valuation Class on the Accounting 1 tab, then you will have to follow the config for MM Account Determination.

entry.title: Re: Use Of Key value map associated in API Proxy
entry.content:
If we create the Keyvalue maps using API at proxy level, we will be able to see the entry here. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-api-management/sap-api-management-for-neo-environment/service-to-add-delete-and-update-key-value-map-at-proxy-level

entry.title: Read email using HTTP adapter Microsoft Graph API
entry.content:
Hi Expert

I want to read email using HTTP adapter Microsoft Graph API. 

I can not use Mail adapter as based on validation after reading mail should go two archive folder  Process and NotDone.

In mail adapter we can configure only one archive folder.

Is it necessary to use OAuth2 Authorization Code?

if we use   OAuth2 Authorization Code ,  Redirect URL is mandatory, but our vendor is unable to add it as they can not create different APP registration for test and prod environment .

does anyone use HTTP adapter to read email. any pointer for configuration?

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: From User Exits to RAP: Adopting a Clean Core Approach in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Thank you for sharing your insights on transitioning from user exits to RAP with a Clean Core approach. I found your example with the Local Event Consumption class quite interesting.

However, I'm curious about the dependency on R_SalesOrderTP for the event consumption. As I understand it, this restricted layer might not align fully with the Clean Core principles, due to the lack of a C1 Contract for Cloud Development.

Ideally, for true Clean Core extensibility, wouldn't local event consumption be more appropriate within the I_SalesOrderTP interface layer, using developer extensibility? Specifically, the addition of a "USE EVENT" command within I_SalesOrderTP would allow us to subscribe to SAP Standard RAP BO events in a Clean Core way. It seems like this would provide a more stable and future-proof solution.

Based on my understanding, it appears that, at least for S/4HANA PCE 2023, there might not be a viable Clean Core solution for local event consumption of SAP Standard RAP BO events.

I hope that in the next S/4HANA PCE version, SAP will expose the events in the Standard RAP BO Interface layer (I_*TP). This would greatly enable Clean Core development and streamline event-driven extensions.

Perhaps I'm misunderstanding something, and I'd appreciate your thoughts on this. Thank you again for the informative post.

entry.title: Re: Working with RAP BO Events end-to-end - Event-driven-architecture - Event framework
entry.content: Excellent blog. I like that you have covered both local and remote. Thank you.

entry.title: Profit center change with KEND in Account-Based Profitability
entry.content: When trying to change the profit center in the KEND transaction, the system does not make any changes. It was written in a blog that this field cannot be changed. But after the blog was written, could someone have found a solution in a different way?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone: Integrate SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud content to SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Hi @Melvin11 

I haven't encountered a direct workaround yet, but the issue seems related to SSO or trust configuration between the IdP and SAP Build Work Zone. Checking trust settings, ACS URL, and destination configurations might help.

Regarding alternatives, SAP Fiori Launchpad in S/4HANA Public Cloud or direct URL integration via custom tiles could be options.

Best,
Nithesh

entry.title: Re: Default G/L account during post goods movement 711 an...
entry.content: Hello, It is S/4Hana Public cloud in the sscui 100297 Automatic account determination is no Inventory area

entry.title: Re: CAP - JAVA action and function
entry.content:
Hi @ananth12,

thanks for sharing the details.

Entity defined in your data model is guid based.

It seems you're trying to pass docId while invoking the endpoint and not the actual guid key. You've to pass GUID key while referring to Entity PDMDocument (as key for your entity is ID, i.e., GUID ) and docId while invoking the action (as you've defined it as an additional importing parameter in service definition. I feel you even don't need docId as importing parameter as your action/function is an instance/bound one).

Your HTTP calls in Postman should look something like below - 

GET : https://procurement-reuse-policy-test-w3ex5y3d-dev-poc-ams-policy-srv.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/odata/v4/DocumentService/PDMDocument(4149f5eb-f262-3000-f000-0002b7fb3600)/getDocumentByDocId(docId='DOC-457') 

POST:  https://procurement-reuse-policy-test-w3ex5y3d-dev-poc-ams-policy-srv.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/odata/v4/DocumentService/PDMDocument(4149f5eb-f262-3000-f000-0002b7fb3600)/deactivateDocument

payload for post request:
{
"docId": "DOC-457"
}

Note - I've passed some random guid for now. You're required to pass GUID of the actual record on which you want to execute this action/function.

Hope this resolves your query.

Please accept the solution if it does.

Regards,

ClearQueries.com 

Follow on LinkedIn

entry.title: Re: How to add GHS data into SAP?
entry.content:
Hello

if you have a SAP EHS set up done you have many options. You can use 3E content or not.

BUT GHS is a complex topic. GHS is handled in EHS in many so called properties.

GHS is e.g. differentiated in e.g. "Classification" and "Labeling". You need to different: how to maintain data: for "LIST_SUB/PURE_SUB and REAL_SUB"

I assume you use 3E content and therefore 3E rulesets.

I am sorry: GHS as such is not discussed "on deep" level here. Any body seems to know how to maintain data etc.

C.B.

entry.title: Process-Driven Innovation and Excellence: How AsInt Leverages SAP Signavio
entry.content:
Preface

In today's fast-paced digital landscape, businesses must operate with agility, precision, and efficiency. Designing optimal business processes is key to achieving operational efficiency in any business. However, as businesses evolve and real-world challenges, events, scenarios emerge, teams often adapt their workflows to address specific situations. Over time, some of these adaptations become standard practice, sometimes leading to inefficiencies. Organizations that continuously refine their processes and proactively minimize these inefficiencies can sustain a competitive edge in the market.

When sub-optimal processes become the norm, inefficiencies and bottlenecks can be difficult to detect. A manager may sense productivity issues but lack the data needed to drive improvements, making process optimization a challenge. This is where process mining proves invaluable, providing business leaders with data-driven insights to uncover hidden inefficiencies, enhance performance, and reduce resource wastage.


Process modelling and mining leverages event logs from information systems to uncover insights, track performance, and enhance workflows. By analysing digital footprints, it provides a clear view of operations, helping organizations identify deviations, bottlenecks, and opportunities for improvement.

Introduction: The Power of Process-Driven Innovation

For AsInt, Inc., a leader in Asset Performance Management (APM) solutions, aligning business processes with customer needs is critical and of paramount importance. This is where SAP Signavio plays a pivotal role.

SAP Signavio is an industry-leading Business Process Management (BPM) suite that enables organizations to map, optimize, and transform business workflows with a data-driven approach. At AsInt, we integrate and utilize Signavio into our daily operations—ranging from product development cycles to customer consulting services and project implementation engagements—ensuring that every asset management centric process is streamlined, customer-focused, and continuously improving.

SAP Signavio in Action at AsInt

1. Driving Agile and Efficient Product Development

Developing next-gen solutions, such as our Asset Intelligence Suite for asset strategy build and mechanical integrity function, mobility tool for inspections, maintenance spend planning for OPEX/CAPEX budget optimization requires an in-depth understanding of industry best practices and workflows, regulatory compliance, and customer pain points. SAP Signavio allows our multiple teams to:

✔️ Map End-to-End Product workflows – From ideation to product deployment, we document every phase to ensure transparency and alignment with customer needs.
✔️ Simulate Business Scenarios – We use Signavio’s capabilities to evaluate different approaches and business processes variants before finalizing product features.
✔️ Ensure Regulatory Compliance and adherence to Industry best practices and standards – Our solutions must adhere to industry standards (e.g., API 581 for RBI, ISO 55000 for asset management). SAP Signavio helps us integrate compliance checkpoints into our workflows.

2. Enhancing Customer Consulting with Process Excellence

For AsInt, customer consulting is more than just providing solutions and software tools—it’s about empowering clients with best practices and industry standards knowledge and understanding along with industry peer’s processes as well. SAP Signavio helps us deliver structured, process-driven engagements by:

📌 Analysing Existing or AS-IS Business Processes – We work with customers to model their current asset management workflows and identify inefficiencies.

📌 Co-Designing Optimized Workflows and Processes – Using SAP Signavio’s collaborative features, we help customers design future-state processes tailored to their operational goals.

📌 Driving Digital Transformation – Whether it's a greenfield asset strategies development process or evergreening and continuous improvement process or even AsInt and SAP APM software product Implementation, we align our consulting efforts with best-in-class process methodologies.

3. Leveraging Data for Continuous Process Optimization

SAP Signavio doesn’t just help us define processes—it enables ongoing process intelligence. It helps us leverage:

📊 Real-Time Process Insights – By integrating with SAP BTP and APM solutions, we extract insights into workflow bottlenecks and optimization opportunities.
📈 Predictive Analytics for Process Improvement – We use AI-driven analytics to predict potential inefficiencies and take proactive action.
🔄 Feedback Loops for Continuous Refinement – With Signavio’s collaborative framework, we continuously refine processes based on real-world execution data.

Conclusion: A Future-Ready Approach to Process-Driven Growth

 At AsInt, SAP Signavio is not just a tool—it’s an integral part of how we build better products, deliver superior consulting and project implementation engagements, and drive operational excellence for our customers. By integrating business process management into our core product strategy, we ensure that every decision we make is backed by data, collaboration, and industry best practices.

As we continue to expand and innovate, our commitment to process-driven transformation remains stronger than ever. With SAP Signavio as a strategic enabler, we are well-positioned to lead the future of asset performance management with efficiency, agility, and customer-centricity.

entry.title: Re: User exit /BADI for IW31 after saving to update AUFK custom fields after save

Create APP on BTP platform and schedule it.

entry.title: Re: Option codes in Change Sales Order (or VA02)
entry.content: This is for selecting delivery type. For example You can have return delivery for return order or LF for standard order OR.

entry.title: Re: PO print status is stuck at In Preparation
entry.content:
Please add email recipient and print queue then press SEND OUTPUT.

If this will not help please show popup from action SEND OUTPUT.

entry.title: Re: Invoke Generative AI Hub Models using @sap-ai-sdk/ai-api library in BAS
entry.content:
Hi Vitaliy,

Thanks for your response! I now understand how to use the function. However, I’m still unclear on how authentication with AI Core is handled.

 

Error: Could not find service credentials for AI Core. Please check the service binding.

 

I'm encountering the above error and tried implementing the authentication using the logic below, but it didn’t work.

 

async function getScenarios(resourceGroup) {
  try {
    const { GenerativeAIHubClient, ScenarioApi } = await import('@sap-ai-sdk/ai-api');
    const client = new GenerativeAIHubClient({
      uaa: {
        url: process.env.GENAI_HUB_TOKEN_URL,
        clientId: process.env.GENAI_HUB_CLIENT_ID,
        clientSecret: process.env.GENAI_HUB_CLIENT_SECRET,
      },
      baseUrl: process.env.GENAI_HUB_URL,
    });

    const result = await ScenarioApi.scenarioQuery({
      'AI-Resource-Group': resourceGroup,
    }).execute();
    return result;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error in getScenarios:', error);
    throw error;
  }
}

 

Could you please guide me on the correct approach?

entry.title: Re: Welcome to our SAP Learning Group moderated by SAP Learning Experts
entry.content: I'm excited to join this group! As someone new to SAP, my main goal is to understand its overall architecture and stay updated on its latest products. To build a solid foundation, I would appreciate guidance on a structured learning path. If there is a chronological list of topics available in your repository, sharing it would be incredibly helpful. This will allow me to progress step by step and gain a clear understanding of SAP concepts. Looking forward to learning from the experiences of others in this group and growing my knowledge in SAP effectively!

entry.title: Re: Redefine or Extend FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER
entry.content: @FabioPagoti Thank you so much! I would have never caught that "Empty project" in the SAP help.. Why is it that there are no blogs that details that step? Most things you find is coping the SAP Standard.. which I thought could not be right. Thanks, I created a new project and did a redefinition of FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER.

entry.title: Re: Precise Control of Fiori App Access with the App Authorization Variants
entry.content: Hello @George_Yu    Great blog, and Great Feature , Are you aware of any plan from SAP to introduce AAV in S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition ? thank you

entry.title: Re: I have started the SUM procedure, but I am getting the error "The content couldn't be loade
entry.content: Also Getting same error

entry.title: Re: Redefine or Extend FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER
entry.content: Glad to help! There should be some blogs but it always gave me the impression this was almost a hidden gem in SEGW (as it's not available anywhere else in the UI apart from the path inside the Data Model folder. For any newer API created in RAP you would need to create some behavior definitions and service definitions with types "extension" by the way.

entry.title: Re: It is possible to change the type of reminder LMS
entry.content: @AlbertoAlvarado, there are plans to enhance the availability of the "Send Reminder" option to managers via a permission. There are additional details here and there'll be in the What's New Viewer. But, as it stands, the outcome of the feature remains exclusively via email.

entry.title: Re: How to report on items removed from the user's learni...
entry.content: @AnaVaqueiro, just to clarify one point: Learning History and Learning Plan are different areas of the system. The Learning History of the user isn't deleted/removed when it becomes inactive, like explained in the KBA 2305693. About the "User Learning Plan Audit Report (CSV)", when the user self-assigns the course, it'd show "User - UserID" in the "Last Updated By" column (C) and "Insert" in the "Action" column (E).

entry.title: Crystal reports crosstab table is too big so skips the first page
entry.content: I have a crystal reports crosstab table is too big so the whole table moves to the next page. I want it to split so that part f the table shows on the first page and the remaining on the next. I tried unticking Keep Object together on the section where this applies but nothing happens. The first pic below is the first page, then the table appears in the second page. Thanks and regards.

entry.title: Re: Export download Issue - Find Technical Objects or Fin...
entry.content:
You will need to get a Developer to create an extension (button in the toolbar) to extract only the lines selected. See the below note.

https://me.sap.com/notes/3515486/E

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge March - SAP Community Escape House - AI 🤖🧠
entry.content:
Hi All , 

I 've got serious problems when running the "yo easy-ui5 project project" command .

That doesn't work , got the error: 

Cannot find package 'chalk' imported from /Users/<user>/.npm/_generator-easy-ui5/plugin-generators/generator-ui5-project/generators/project/index.js

Error [ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND]: Cannot find package 'chalk' imported from /Users/m<user>/.npm/_generator-easy-ui5/plugin-generators/generator-ui5-project/generators/customcontrol/index.js  This file is then searched too in   ...generators/cap/index.js and other paths. Any help on this.  Regards Markus

entry.title: Re: Notification long text no longer has User's name or phone of person who added long text
entry.content: Function Module TEXT_CREATE_HISTORY_LINE which was changed by note 2846912 has to be copied and modified back to the previous to add the Username & Phone number

entry.title: Re: Time Stamp in PM Notification - Name of the notificat...
entry.content:
Function Module TEXT_CREATE_HISTORY_LINE has to be copied and modified back to previous to show the Username and phone number.

See note https://me.sap.com/notes/2846912/E  This explains why it has been done.

I see you are in Australia so check out my question I resolved back in 2023
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/notification-long-text-no-longer-has-user-s-name-or-phone-of-person-who/qaq-p/12689209

entry.title: Re: Building an Attachment Upload and Download Solution Using UploadSetwithTable Control
entry.content:
Hi @TimoMaier,

Thanks for highlighting this. Yes, the best way is to use the corresponding getter from the model to retrieve the service URL instead of hard-coding it. For us, it was just a POC😊

entry.title: Re: Understanding the Technology Behind SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) - Out of the box 'Insight App&&
entry.content: Thank you Venu for a very clear explanation of not just the "what" and "why" BDC is such a revolutionary product, but also the "how" it is expected to change the "analytics" landscape. the step-wise explanation is extremely valuable for learners and decision makers alike.

entry.title: Re: Filter on a Date Field, defaulted with the current date
entry.content: Hello Siddu. Thanks a lot for your clear feedback. I appreciated it a lot

entry.title: Re: Why aren't QR codes displayed in the preview or when...
entry.content:
I think I've found the reason why the QR code isn't displaying.

When I refresh the report data, the QR code appears again. I think because the number of records is so high and the QR files are in an image field, the report isn't able to display the images until the data is refreshed again.

I don't know if this is the real reason, but right now, every time I refresh the data, the QR codes appear again. This even happens when I send the report to the printer.

entry.title: SAP-tietovarastoasiantuntija (for Finnish-speaking job applicants)
entry.content:
Tietovarastoasiantuntija


🚀 SINUSTAKO SEURAAVA SAP-YMPÄRISTÖN TUNTEVA TIETOVARASTOASIANTUNTIJAMME?

Etsimme tiimiimme tietovarastoasiantuntijaa, jolla on kokemusta SAP-ympäristöistä ja kiinnostusta liiketoiminnan analytiikan kehittämiseen.

Meistä

Kärkkäinen Oy on kotimainen, innovatiivinen ja kannattavasti kasvava perheyritys, joka palvelee asiakkaita Suomen suurimpiin lukeutuvissa tavarataloissa, verkkokaupassa ja tukkukaupassa. Liikevaihtomme on yli 340 miljoonaa euroa ja henkilöstöömme kuuluu nykyään lähes tuhat työntekijää. Verkkokauppamme karkkainen.com on nopeasti kasvava yli 400 000 tuotteen verkkokauppa. Tavoitteenamme on kasvaa yhdeksi Suomen merkittävimmistä kaupan toimijoista sekä laajentaa lähitulevaisuudessa ulkomaille.

🔎 Mitä etsimme?

Pääset mukaan kehittämään ja automatisoimaan liiketoiminnan raportointia osana taloushallinnon tiimiämme. Päivittäiseen työhösi kuuluu muun muassa:

• Datan tuominen BW/4HANA-tietovarastoon rajapintojen kautta eri järjestelmistä, erityisesti ERP:stä
• Datan validointi ja mallintaminen, jotta se voidaan jalostaa BI-järjestelmäämme (SAP Analytics Cloud)
• Osallistuminen toiminnanohjausjärjestelmän päivitysprojektiin (SAP ECC → SAP S/4HANA)

Menestyäksesi tehtävässä sinulla tulisi olla kokemusta seuraavista:

• SAP-toiminnanohjausjärjestelmät ja tietovarastointi
• Rajapinnat sekä ETL/ELT-prosessit
• SQL- ja ABAP-ohjelmointikielet

Lisäksi odotamme sinulta sujuvia vuorovaikutustaitoja suomeksi, oma-aloitteisuutta, oppimishalua sekä englannin kielen riittävää taitoa  – kasvava ja monipuolinen liiketoimintamme tarjoaa joka päivä uusia mahdollisuuksia kehittää omaa osaamista!

🐷 Miksi meille?

Meidän mielestämme töissä pitää olla myös mukavaa. Yhteisöllisyys ja tiimihenki eivät ole meille pelkkiä sanoja, vaan meillä rakennetaan yhdessä kannustavaa työympäristöä. Saat ympärillesi osaavia ja innostuneita kollegoita, joiden kanssa pääset viemään liiketoiminnan analytiikkaa uudelle tasolle. 

Tarjoamme lisäksi hyvät henkilöstöedut, kuten kattavan kulttuuri- hieronta- ja liikuntaedun (ePassi). Meillä on soveltuvin osin mahdollisuus työskennellä etänä, vaikka kannustammekin myös lähityöhön. Työskentelypaikkakuntasi on Oulu tai muu sovittu paikkakunta. 


Kiinnostuitko?

Lähetä hakemuksesi ja palkkatoiveesi mahdollisimman pian ja viimeistään 15.3.2025. Täytämme paikan heti sopivan henkilön löydyttyä. Lisätietoja tehtävästä antaa Talous- ja hallintojohtaja Riku Ilvesluoto (p. 040 555 3663, riku.ilvesluoto@karkkainen.com).

 

Haku alkaa 20. helmikuuta 2025 ja päättyy 15. maaliskuuta 2025, klo 23.59 (Europe/Helsinki)
Työsuhteen tyyppi: vakituinen, kokoaikainen

Kärkkäinen Oy

Karkkainen.com verkkokauppa – Yli 400 000 tuotteen tavaratalo netissä

Kärkkäiseltä löydät helposti ja edullisesti kaiken tarvitsemasi mahtavasta, yli 400 000 tuotteen valikoimasta!

Ota yhteyttä:

Puhelin: 040 5553663
Sähköposti: riku.ilvesluoto@karkkainen.com

Hakulinkki: https://ats.talentadore.com/apply/tietovarastoasiantuntija/ZleyeP

entry.title: NW Natural (Portland, OR) - Two open positions
entry.content:
1. SAP Sr.  FICO Analyst (apply here)
  2. SAP PM Analyst (apply here)

Two great fulltime opportunities working with all of the latest and greatest, S4 HANA 2023, SAP Analytics Cloud, Group Reporting, etc, ect.  Come join a great team and great work environment at NW Natural!

This is a hybrid role that requires two days a week in the office in Portland, OR

entry.title: Re: Why aren't QR codes displayed in the preview or when...
entry.content: Hi, Are you using url to generate qr or straight using qr code from sap?

entry.title: How to Implement Load Balancing in SAP CAP Node.js on BTP?
entry.content: What are the steps to implement load balancing for a Node.js application using SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) on SAP BTP to ensure high availability and avoid service downtime during high traffic flows, so that no service becomes unavailable or overloaded?

entry.title: A 25x faster mta.yaml build for SAP CAP Node.js projects
entry.content:
Here’s a quick, and clean, trick to speed up the build step in SAP CAP Node.js projects, and improve deploy times to SAP BTP as a side-effect.

I’ve been exploring ways to improve CAP Node.js build and deploy times. I’ve tried crazy shell scripts, NPM caching + offline, replacing NPM with PNPM, using the parameter --no-clean in the command $ cds build --production --no-clean, etc. Everything gave me better results than the default build, and I’d love to see more PNPM in CAP projects, but they required too many changes or were not intuitive. Then, I landed on this which gave me incredible results and seemed foolproof…

The “secret” starts with: do NOT build and deploy node_modules folder! Here’s the reason and a little tweak to take it to the next level…

 

Why SAP CAP build is slow

When building a CAP project with Cloud MTA Build Tool (MBT), it uses the mta.yaml instructions to generate an archive file (*.mtar) that is used to deploy to SAP BTP. By default, the archive contains the artefacts from the project (frontend + backend + database), including all their dependencies. As you may know, Node.js dependencies are stored in the node_modules folder and it can be MASSIVE.

node_modules can bend the spacetime fabric

 

 

 

 

Downloading all dependencies and including them into the archive file may take a lot of time.
Here’s an example of how node_modules can get ugly, it’s from a famous package used for test automation: Jest.

Jest and its 155 MB of dependencies

 

Yes, those are the dependencies from just ONE and ONLY package: 155 MB. Node.js projects may have dozens of dependencies…

 

How to leverage the tooling

I remember when I started working as a developer, before ABAP, building web applications with vanilla HTML/JavaScript as the frontend and PHP for the backend. Those were the days of ADSL modem and its impressive 256 kbit/s (not dial up, I’m not that old) and the golden rule for web performance was: the best performance improvement you get, is from the bytes you don’t send. Or, as Julius Rock would say:

“The discount is bigger if I don't buy anything”

 

Cloud Foundry has a built-in feature to execute $ npm install when applications are deployed missing node_modules. Taking advantage of this feature, we can completely ignore node_modules in our built/deployed projects and leave Cloud Foundry to install the dependencies for us. Thanks nodejs-buildpack!

MBT can exclude files and folders from the built *.mtar file using the parameter ignore in build-parameters.

 

Build the default way

This is what you see out there in most of the CAP Node.js projects. A simple MTA module declaration using heaps of defaults, not explicit setting the configuration. This results in a non-optimal build which may be OK if you want to. It also results in the node_modules folder inflating the *.mtar file.

Build the project...

 

modules:
  - name: btp-cap-rag-ai-srv-001
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/srv
    build-parameters:
      builder: npm
    provides:
      - name: srv-api
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url}
    requires:
      - name: btp-cap-rag-ai-db-001

  - name: btp-cap-rag-ai-db-deployer-001
    type: hdb
    path: gen/db
    requires:
      - name: btp-cap-rag-ai-db-001

 

I’m testing an application which has 2 Fiori apps + CAP backend + HANA database. Building this mta.yaml takes over 6 minutes to complete and creates a *.mtar file with a size of 58 MB. Add another couple minutes to send it over to SAP BTP. If the internet isn’t the fastest, you may spend 10 minutes to build/deploy the application.

Total time spent to run $ mbt build -t gen including node_modules = 6 minutes and 18 seconds

 

Size of *.mtar file including node_modules = 58 MB

 

Build 6x faster

Now, let MBT know we don’t want the node_modules folder included in the archive. Make sure to do it for all Node.js applications in the project which also includes the one in the db folder. I know you don’t even have a package.json in the db folder, but you should…

Build the project...

 

modules:
  - name: btp-cap-rag-ai-srv-001
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/srv
    build-parameters:
      builder: npm
      ignore:
        - node_modules/
    provides:
      - name: srv-api
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url}
    requires:
      - name: btp-cap-rag-ai-db-001

  - name: btp-cap-rag-ai-db-deployer-001
    type: hdb
    path: gen/db
    build-parameters:
      builder: npm
      ignore:
        - node_modules/
    requires:
      - name: btp-cap-rag-ai-db-001

 

The build took 1 minute! And the generated *.mtar file size is 136 KB (Kilobytes, not Megabytes)! That’s 6x faster than the default behaviour. We reduced build time by 84% with a single parameter.

Total time spent to run $ mbt build -t gen excluding node_modules = 1 minute

 

Size of *.mtar file excluding node_modules = 136 KB

 

That’s impressive. However, we want more!

More! MORE!!!

 

Build 25x faster

Usually, the builder parameter is set to npm or npm-ci to install dependencies in build time. This $ npm install happens in the gen folder (not in the project’s root), this is what gets added to the archive. Now, think. If we’re excluding node_modules from the *.mtar file, why do we need to install the dependencies during build? We don’t! We can skip installing the dependencies altogether!!! Let’s change our mta.yaml one more time to customize the builder.

In the modules build-parameters section, set builder to custom and pass any valid NPM command. I like to use the command $ npm root because it’s super light and it runs locally, it doesn’t send any request out to the internet.

Build the project...

 

modules:
  - name: btp-cap-rag-ai-srv-001
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/srv
    build-parameters:
      builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm root
      ignore:
        - node_modules/
    provides:
      - name: srv-api
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url}
    requires:
      - name: btp-cap-rag-ai-db-001

  - name: btp-cap-rag-ai-db-deployer-001
    type: hdb
    path: gen/db
    build-parameters:
      builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm root
      ignore:
        - node_modules/
    requires:
      - name: btp-cap-rag-ai-db-001

 

Build took 15 SECONDS!!! That’s 25x faster than the default behaviour. We reduced build time by 96% with almost no effort, just a simple configuration.

Total time spent to run $ mbt build -t gen excluding node_modules and avoiding npm install when possible = 15 seconds

 

Now, deploying 136 KB of *.mtar file to SAP BTP should be much faster than the initial 60 MB. The application still requires the dependencies to run, but they’ll be installed by Cloud Foundry on the server side. I’m pretty sure SAP BTP in AWS/Azure/GCP data centers have a faster internet connection than your home office 😜

I’d love to see MBT delivering a new builder parameter value called “none”, “skip” or “too-lazy-to-build” to mimic the behaviour I’d described here… Blazing fast build time without a cost!

entry.title: Re: Printing a single page from multiple pages using Crystal Reports Viewer
entry.content: Hi, DonWilliams. Sorry, it seems the image failed to send. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Designing UI5 Apps as Business Solution for SAP Build Work Zone - Part 3
entry.content: Excellent post as always.... however, the link to part 4 at the bottom here is not working.

entry.title: nota fiscal NFSe not generated for Brazil BRIM invoice
entry.content:
Hello BRIM experts,

We have an issue where notafiscal is not generated for Brazil invoice generated in convergent invoicing (BRIM system) - no system error also issued. Giving sample invoice screenshots, and details of configuration maintained.

BRIM invoice sample - you can see tax groups, tax laws and fiscal doc type = NFSE, business place populated. Invoice created without any errors - PIS,COFINS,ISS tax populated.

Need assistance to figure out what key link/config might be missing due to which NFSe is not getting generated.

Any information on where we can setup debugger and check?

SAP Convergent Invoicing SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil (SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica) for SAP S/4HANA SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management 

We have only 1 tax scenario for brazil - cofins+Pis+iss = 12.15 % - taxes are calculated using MM tax procedure and single tax code used B9. taxes are calculated by populating default tax determination code (ERMWSKZ) mapped to B9 in BITs.

Details of configuration maintained

1. Convergent invoicing -> assign business place to notafiscal type

2. Map condition types for ISS

3. Map withholding tax groups to NF tax types

Nota Fiscal config – under cross application functions

4. Only NS will be used for services – number range assigned

5. CNPJ business place defined for Brazil – only for BR c.code

6. Electronic fiscal doc config – using external mastersaf installed tool

Assign business place to plan – default plant attached to BR company code

Service Types assignment

NF forms assignment maintained

Condition records mapped for NFS form

Processing program

Output determination

Field catalog

Screen control assigned to NS notafiscal type

Many Thanks

entry.title: SAP B1 WEB CLIENT
entry.content: When I open web clinet, I am prompted that sapui is out of date, as shown in the picture. What should I do to access web clinet normally

entry.title: Re: Printing a single page from multiple pages using Crys...
entry.content: try again, hold the ALT key and hit the print screen key, then in the post use CRTL C to copy the image. Or attach it as a JPEG

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2025 trial download
entry.content: Odd, I did check and it was there... You can download it from here: https://origin.softwaredownloads.sap.com/public/site/index.html

entry.title: Re: Why aren't QR codes displayed in the preview or when...
entry.content:
CR doesn't support QR Codes directly, there are work arounds though:

https://www.idautomation.com/barcode-components/native-crystal-reports-generator/qr-code/

Or

https://kenhamady.com/productlinks/default.html#ufl

Ken has a UFL that supports them and other options

https://kenhamady.com/cru/archives/2342

As you noted when using images of the QR Codes you will run out of room depending on the size of the report...

Better to use one of the above solutions

entry.title: Re: Issue with APK Installation - "App Not Installed as P...
entry.content:
@princykumar I tested it on my personal Android device, and I was able to install the MDK client built with same package name using the cloud build service. 

We need to look into the details of what you tried. Could you please create a support incident with the MOB-CLD component.

entry.title: Assign Financial Statement Versions to Accounting Principles
entry.content:
There is an attempt to change settings in sscui 103215 - assign financial statement versions to accounting principles.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Partner COEの品質計測における顧客EWAレポートの送付方法について
entry.content:
Partner COEの品質計測における「SAP の SAP EarlyWatch Alert 対応カスタマ率」の項目を達成するにあたり、下記を確認させてください。

■確認
➀今回に限りEWAレポートを貴社へ送付する手段としてメール等を利用することは可能でしょうか。

②EWAレポートを貴社へ送付する手段は通常下記2通りと認識しておりますが、他にもございますでしょうか。
・PCoEのSolmanで顧客システムをサテライト登録し、EWA取得。
・顧客SolmanでのEWA取得⇒EWAの有効化のところでSend to SAPにチェックを入れる。




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Assign Financial Statement Versions to Accounting Pri...
entry.content:
In app Balance sheet/Income Statement adapt filter and add field Account Display Open help on field herein you will see the following stated 

Account Display

Use

The G/L Accounts column normally shows the accounts belonging to the company code chart of accounts. You can however choose to display the G/L accounts assigned to a country chart of accounts.

To do this, show the Account Display filter field and select the Alternative Account option.

For more information, see How to Display Alternative Account Numbers.

I also reference you for your information KBA 3530183 - Assigning Accounting Principles to Ledgers and Company Codes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: Details on Configuration in General Ledger Accounting and Asset Accounting

See also configuration help on Assign Company Code to Chart of Accounts id 103659 

Check and maintain the assignment of charts of accounts to company code

Standard Settings

YCOA is your operating chart of accounts and assigned to all of your company codes. Alternative (local) charts of accounts are already predefined for several countries/regions. For these alternative COAs, an assignment to a company code is also delivered. You cannot change these assignments.

For company codes not assigned to an alternative COA, you can make your own assignment. For example, if you created your own alternative chart of accounts for a country/region in the “Edit Chart of Accounts List” step, you can add that chart of accounts here as the alternative chart of accounts. Or you can assign one of the predefined alternative charts of accounts.

See also Financial Statement Version (FSV)

entry.title: Re: Partner COEの品質計測における顧客EWAレポートの送付方法について
entry.content:
ご担当者　様

平素よりお世話になっております。

お問い合わせにつき、下記回答させていただきます。

➀今回に限りEWAレポートを貴社へ送付する手段としてメール等を利用することは可能でしょうか。

＝＞恐れ入りますが、それはできかねます。

②EWAレポートを貴社へ送付する手段は通常下記2通りと認識しておりますが、他にもございますでしょうか。
・PCoEのSolmanで顧客システムをサテライト登録し、EWA取得。
・顧客SolmanでのEWA取得⇒EWAの有効化のところでSend to SAPにチェックを入れる。

＝＞ほかの方法としては、管理対象システム（顧客システム）からサポートバックボーンに接続し、収集されたEWAセッションデータを直接にSAP側に送信して、SAP側より生成できます。

SAP側で生成する場合、恐れ入りますが、SAPノート207223をご参照頂き、関連設定をご実施ください。

207223 SAP EarlyWatch Alert processed at SAP

以上、ご確認のほどよろしくお願いいたします。
SAPサポート
ショウセイ

entry.title: Re: FP2502 Client crash - session timed out.
entry.content: It is a prompt, it means your access token has expired, and you need to log in again.

entry.title: Print Layout Design - end of page to include terms and conditions
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have 3 pages of 'GENERAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF SALE AND SERVICES' in PDF format that I need to include in the sales order print layout design (PLD). So that we user print the sales order, the 'GENERAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF SALE AND SERVICES' will print on the last page of the layout.

How can I achieve this in the PLD?
